title: Just 3D Armors HMI
description: Added 3d armor items that are held by hold my items
body:
## Requires [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1)

Added custom 3d armor models in hand and they are wearable!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SsDP3IAxwuI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



**in game footages are shot with [no shade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-entity-shade) so it does not look shaded.**
